steps.title: Identify the appositive structure
steps.content: The blank contains the subject noun phrase for attest in “as ______ attest.” The phrase has “researchers” as the head noun and “Roberto Scandone and Christopher Kilburn” as the appositive. Since these names are essential to identifying which researchers, they form a restrictive appositive.

steps.title: Apply the restrictive appositive rule
steps.content: Restrictive appositives—those essential to identifying the noun—do not use commas. The phrase should be “researchers Roberto Scandone and Christopher Kilburn” without punctuation. The other choices incorrectly add commas. That matches choice C — C is correct.
